title: Death Knows No Time
writer: Miguel Cussó, Odoardo Fiory, Eduardo Manzanos
actors: Guglielmo Spoletini, Wayde Preston, Agnès Spaak
plot: A Mexican peasant evicted from his land becomes an enraged outlaw. He is finally arrested and sent to prison. In the meantime, his only, little son has been given to a wealthy family. Once he has paid his whole penalty, he decides...
